headline: A compact command center for the Royals season

latest_prospect_update.name: Blake Mitchell
latest_prospect_update.note: Most obvious remaining minor-league prospect to track; catcher development and power/patience are the main signals. Recent line: .136 / .355 / .182.

nightly_recap: The Royals lost to the Chicago White Sox, KC 5, CWS 6. Bobby Witt Jr. led the night, 2-5 | HR, K, RBI in the latest Royals game. Jac Caglianone supplied the loudest Royals contact at 114.5 mph.

player_of_game.name: Bobby Witt Jr.
player_of_game.reason: 2-5 | HR, K, RBI in the latest Royals game.
